title: Linking the E-mail & Activities date and time to the Activity Board
excerpt: When editing an activity in E-mail & Activites (changing the date of this activity by editing), it is important that the “Start time” date on the Activities board changes to the new date. So that these dates are synchron…

posts.author: Arek (Arkadiusz)
posts.cookedHtml:
When editing an activity in E-mail & Activites (changing the date of this activity by editing), it is important that the “Start time” date on the Activities board changes to the new date. So that these dates are synchronized between the E-mail & Activites application and the Activity Board

For example, in E-mail & Activites we add “Meeting” to the contact for the next month, e.g. July 20, 2024, 11:30. Adding this activity creates an item with this date on the Activities board (Start time). The client calls us and changes the date/time of the meeting to July 21, 2024, 1:00 p.m.

When an agent changes the date/time on the Activities board (Start time) or in E-mail & Activites by editing this activity (Meeting), changing this date in only one place, the agent should have the date/time updated in both places, both in E-mail & Activites as well as on the Activity Board.

posts.author: Amarin (Amarin)
posts.cookedHtml: This is an important feature for us. Upvote from me.

posts.author: Tuesday123 (Matthew Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml: Same upvote for us please. Without a two way sync we can’t get much value from the Activities board

posts.author: MaxKP (Max)
posts.cookedHtml: Seconded. This is one of the most frustrating pieces of this so-called CRM… and really sad how no one from Monday seems to bother. Instead, we get plenty of “AI” columns that no one asked for.
